summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Invitaciones app (ES). All 11 pytest backend tests pass. Frontend E2E flow verified end-to-end: landing (6 theme cards), navigate to /crear with preselected theme, form fill, live preview updates, theme chip switch, save->success screen with public+edit links, public invitation view with countdown, RSVP submission with success, edit flow (load, change theme, save), invalid edit token error, and invitation-not-found page.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: RSVP endpoint reads doc but only needs script_url; minor efficiency (fine as-is).

InvitationView: inv-maps-btn / inv-waze-btn are conditional on maps_url/waze_url being present. Builder form does not expose these fields via the listed data-testids, so buttons won't appear unless populated. If desired, add optional inputs (input-maps-url, input-waze-url) in Builder or auto-generate URLs from address.
Backend allows script_url string via POST but is not surfaced by Builder UI in this test; verified by design (Google Apps Script is user-configured).
seed_data_creation: Created 2 TEST_ prefixed invitations during runs and 1 RSVP record. Prefixed with TEST_ for easy identification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend URL: https://invite-designer-31.preview.emergentagent.com. All 6 themes valid: videojuegos, princesas, superheroes, dinosaurios, espacio, unicornios. Public GET properly hides edit_token and script_url. Maps/Waze buttons only render when respective URLs are set on the invitation (currently no UI input for them in Builder testid list).
